title: Exosome-enriched extracellular vesicles are associated with Getah virus RNA and transmission-related readouts in vitro
author: Liu, Yinghao
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains the  raw qPCR data, unprocessed Western blot images, electron microscope images and Immunofluorescence assay images for Figures 1–6 in the manuscript titled Exosomes Mediate Getah Virus Transmission A Novel Mechanism for Getah Virus.
steps_raw: This dataset contains the  raw qPCR data, unprocessed Western blot images, electron microscope images and Immunofluorescence assay images for Figures 1–6 in the manuscript titled Exosomes Mediate Getah Virus Transmission A Novel Mechanism for Getah Virus.
